hero.title: Reduce your electricity bills by up to
hero.lede: Power your home with Australia's solar experts — tier-one solar, battery storage and EV charging across the NEM, with STC rebates applied upfront and DNSP approvals handled end to end.

form.title: 60-second quote
form.subtitle: Tell us about your property — we'll model STCs and annual savings in AUD.

calcPreview.title: See your STC rebate and payback in AUD
calcPreview.lede: Model annual generation using your state irradiance, electricity rate and system size. Includes 2026 deeming period and zone factors.

services.title: Complete solar solutions for Australian homes and businesses

whySolar.title: Four reasons Australians are switching now

pillars.title: Cut electricity bills
pillars.text: Average households save $1,200–$2,400 AUD per year by self-consuming solar across the NEM.

pillars.title: STC rebates
pillars.text: Federal STCs reduce upfront cost by thousands. We claim them at point of sale — no paperwork for you.

pillars.title: Energy independence
pillars.text: Batteries and EV chargers let you store and use your own power during peak tariffs and outages.

pillars.title: Increase property value
pillars.text: Homes with CEC-installed solar sell faster. Buyers value lower running costs and warranty transferability.

rebatesBand.title: Maximise STC and state rebates in 2026
rebatesBand.lede: Federal STCs plus state battery incentives in NSW, VIC, SA and ACT can stack for eligible households.
items: STC spot price applied at quote — typically $36–$40 per certificate
Solar Victoria battery rebate eligibility checks
NSW battery incentive and interest-free loan guidance

whyUs.title: Australia's trusted solar partner since 2014
whyUs.lede: We're CEC accredited across every state in the NEM. Our in-house designers, installers and customer care team manage DNSP approvals, STC claims and commissioning — so you switch on with confidence.

items.title: CEC-accredited design & install
items.text: Every system uses Clean Energy Council approved products and certified installers.

items.title: Transparent AUD pricing
items.text: Itemised quotes with STC breakdown, no hidden fees, and finance options explained clearly.

items.title: Local teams in every state
items.text: NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT and ACT — we know your DNSP rules.

items.title: 10-year workmanship warranty
items.text: Plus manufacturer panel and inverter warranties up to 25 years.

testimonials.title: Trusted by homeowners and businesses nationwide

finance.title: $0 upfront solar finance
finance.lede: Green loans from accredited Australian lenders. Repayments often less than your pre-solar electricity bill.
finance.cardText: Subject to lender approval. Example: 6.6 kW system at $8,200 after STCs, $89/fortnight over 5 years.

serviceAreas.title: Installing across every Australian state and territory

ctaBand.title: Ready to power your home with solar?
ctaBand.lede: Book a free CEC site inspection or get an instant quote.
